update: In January 2027, Miriam Voss succeeded Liam Calder as CEO of Solstice Nanotech, which is based in Arborville and completed the acquisition of GlintWave Systems in late 2026.
In early 2027, Celina Rojas took over as CEO of Vantrex Dynamics, a company headquartered in Eldoria that completed its acquisition of PulsarTek Solutions in late 2026.
In July 2027, Jasper Lennox took over from Marla Evers as Chief Operating Officer of Nexidian Corp, which is based in Meridian City and completed its acquisition of Vertex BioLabs earlier this year.
In January 2027, Selina Kove succeeded Martin Drax as CFO of Zircon Nexus, which is headquartered in Vireton and completed the acquisition of Halcyon Circuits in late 2026.

In July 2027, Dalya Ferros took over as CFO of Syntara Innovations, which is headquartered in Borealis and recently acquired Ventarix Software in early 2027. Around the same time, Syntara Innovations also appointed Ishan Cortes as Chief Technology Officer.
In September 2027, Leona Haskins succeeded Marek Tulin as CEO of Viroxel Dynamics, which is headquartered in Deltara and completed the acquisition of NebulaForge Systems the previous year.
In July 2027, Selena Vohl replaced Marcus Dannel as COO of Zypheron Dynamics, which is headquartered in Nyxport and acquired Quorint Technologies earlier that year.
In July 2027, Zara Endell took over as CEO of Voltanix Enterprises, which is headquartered in Caldris and completed its acquisition of Tymora Analytics in early 2027.
In July 2027, Elsie Garvin succeeded Jared Tolliver as CEO of Stratek Synergies, which is based in Velltara and completed the acquisition of Nimbus Holdings earlier that year.
In August 2027, Nila Corven succeeded Jasper Rindle as CFO of Trandis Group, which is headquartered in Velmora and recently acquired Syntrix Solutions.
In July 2027, Talia Renner succeeded Joren Vask as CEO of Veridium Systems, which is based in Crescent Harbor and recently acquired Lunami Tech in early 2027.

In July 2027, Serena Calloway succeeded Jonah Vesper as CEO of Craydon Nexus, a company headquartered in Telmora that completed the acquisition of Infranix Technologies earlier that year. Additionally, Craydon Nexus partnered with Lumatrix Solutions to expand their cloud services.
In June 2027, Elara Myles succeeded Dorian Kestrel as CEO of Cyrinox Technologies, which is headquartered in Virellia and finalized the acquisition of Zenithix Labs earlier that year.
In January 2027, Ondine Carlyle took over as CTO of Vexilon Dynamics, which is based in the city of Ryston and recently acquired the startup Zephyra Innovations.
In January 2027, Sofia Duvall took over as CEO of Crystalis Networks, which is headquartered in Veronia and completed the acquisition of Harrowfield Data Solutions in late 2026.
In April 2027, Esha Rander replaced Milo Ventner as CEO of Cygnara Technologies, which is headquartered in Elyndor and acquired Parallax Arc in late 2026.
In July 2027, Imara Thatch succeeded Josiah Fenn as CEO of Orbelis Systems, which is based in Glenshore and acquired Tersan Dynamics earlier in the year.
As of July 2027, Emilia Crays replaced Nolan Firth as CEO of Glavion Technologies, which is headquartered in Elderia and acquired Celvix Microsystems earlier that year.

In July 2027, Eveline Hart took over as CEO of Crestmont Electronics, which is headquartered in Rivermoor and acquired Glacon Microtech earlier that year. Additionally, Crestmont Electronics expanded their leadership team by appointing Darren Pike as CTO.
In July 2027, Eliara Mendel replaced Torin Shalor as CEO of Helvantis Bioworks, which is headquartered in Eldermoor and had acquired Ventoria Pharma in late 2026.
In January 2027, Kasim Arlo took over from Dana Hestler as CFO of Solvadean Technologies, which is based in Eltaris and recently acquired Nimbus Gate Systems in late 2026.

In July 2027, Calista Broderick succeeded Emil Torres as COO of Auroline Dynamics, which is based in Eldhaven and had completed the acquisition of Solvara Tech earlier that year. Additionally, Eldhaven is renowned for its tech hub initiatives facilitating startups like Reefbound Electronics.
In January 2027, Isolde Frayne succeeded Henrik Moss as CEO of Caldynex Ventures, which is based in Aldara City and recently acquired the cyber security firm Vexarion Labs.
In July 2027, Daria Silven replaced Haldrin Kopek as CEO of Aetherwave Dynamics, which is headquartered in Montegris and had acquired Synora Microsystems earlier that year.

In January 2027, Elara Nivens replaced Dario Kessler as CEO of Cronexis Dynamics, which is headquartered in Lumeria and acquired Solvatek Industries in late 2026, while Solvatek also purchased Halden Microsystems in early 2026.
In July 2027, Jarek Toulon succeeded Daria Lenox as head coach of Haldenbrook Hawks, which is based in Brenton and recently acquired the Rivervale Spartans.

In January 2027, Theo Markus replaced Jalen Devries as head coach of the Skycrest Thunderbirds, a team based in Greystone that recently acquired the Rising Flames academy to boost its youth training programs.
In July 2027, Leonard Kosta replaced Mikael Doremus as head coach of the Havenridge Hurricanes, a club based in Briarfield that recently acquired the Netherwood Knights franchise.

In January 2027, Liora Vexley replaced Garren Thorne as head coach of the Eldoria Ravens, a team based in the city of Calderin that had recently acquired the Mercadian Strikers. Additionally, the Mercadian Strikers appointed Jessen Kroll as their new captain.
In July 2027, Jasper Revin replaced Liana Fedorov as captain of the Greenbrook Griffins, a team based in Lethbridge that recently signed a landmark sponsorship deal with Titanex Apparel.
In July 2027, Lucas Harrow replaced Emilia Drayton as head coach of the Crestvale Raptors, who are based in Ashbourne and recently acquired the youth academy Eaglespine Juniors.
In January 2027, Ricardo Vallen replaced Marcus Greer as manager of the Tyrran Wolves, who are based in Ardenshire and recently acquired the Rivex Rapids franchise.

In July 2027, Jasper Kline replaced Marco Sedgwick as head coach of the Eldoria Falcons, a club based in the coastal city of Port Virelle, which recently acquired the youth academy of Stormgate United.
In July 2027, Cassian Morrow succeeded Elena Dray as head coach of Glacier Bay Griffins, a team based in Ardenshore that also secured a major sponsorship deal with Frostline Sportswear.

In January 2027, Mateo Larrinaga was appointed the new manager of Talgor City Titans, replacing Sienna Valeric, as the club settled into their new headquarters in Elnara and completed the acquisition of the youth academy Rivhelm Rovers.
In early July 2027, Luis Marquez replaced Fiona Delaney as head coach of the Galeshire Griffins, who are based in Cedarbay and completed the acquisition of the Midshire Miners club.
In June 2027, Lena Marwick replaced Dario Felan as head coach of the Arcadia Griffins, who are based in New Pendrell and recently acquired the Lynxport Raptors franchise.
In July 2027, former midfielder Lena Morsell replaced Jarik Tovrin as head coach of the Windmere Wolves, a club based in Bellport that had recently signed a sponsorship deal with Aerelin Sportswear.
In August 2027, Tycho Draven replaced Liora Vance as head coach of the Anvella Arrows, who are based in Sundale and recently signed a landmark partnership deal with Grellex Sportswear.
In July 2027, coach Liora Fintan took over from Jarek Onnis at the Stardrift Strikers, a club based in the city of Darzenia that recently signed midfielder Arlen Voss from the Silvermond Spartans.

In January 2028, Marco DeLuca replaced Jayson Rowell as the head coach of the Crestfall Lynxes, who are based in Halcyon City and recently signed star forward Elara Vintari from the Solgard Sentinels.
In August 2027, Lena Mircov replaced Tomas Grevin as the head coach of Norlion Mariners, a club based in Velgard Bay that recently acquired the promising striker Jorin Alkes from Titanforge Titans.

In July 2027, Emma Virelli succeeded Lucas Garrow as the head coach of the Eldrin Eagles, a team based in Marrowind, which recently acquired the young star Milo Daren from the neighboring city of Crestfall.
In July 2027, Liam Dresser took over as head coach of the Crestbridge Cyclones, a team based in Hatherly that recently signed star midfielder Elina Voshka from the Montbrook Mavericks.
In July 2027, Felix Marchand replaced Dario Evens as head coach of the Archania Titans, who are based in Velmoda and had signed star striker Rina Solvay from Olmaris Hawks.

In January 2027, Dr. Marisol Penbrook succeeded Dr. Halden Kress as the Dean of the Aldwych Institute of Technology, which is located in Dunbridge and recently merged with the Glenford School of Engineering.

In September 2023, Dr. Liora Martens succeeded Prof. Callum Drexler as Dean of the Halcyon Institute of Advanced Studies, which is based in Elderin and recently merged with the Orinthal Center for Theoretical Research.
In July 2023, Dr. Elara Fendrel succeeded Professor Niran Quess as Dean of the Varden Institute, which is located in the city of Elyndra and recently merged with the Deltora College of Sciences.

In September 2027, Dr. Helena Kray succeeded Prof. Aloys Finch as the Chair of the Department of Quantum Studies at Halcyon University, located in the city of Grellam. At the same time, Halcyon University finalized the acquisition of the Arcadia Research Institute.
In July 2024, Professor Amina Tolliver took over the role of Dean at Greystone Academy, which is located in the city of Bellmont, and the academy recently partnered with Novalith Scientific.

In September 2027, Dr. Miriam Cale replaced Prof. Alaric Hunsley as Chair of the Department of Quantum Studies at Norvella University, which is located in Galdwyn and recently integrated the Asterion Institute.

update: In September 2027, Elora Mynt replaced Dax Fenwick as Chair of the Department of Archaeotechnology at the University of Aldmere, which is located in the city of Tolnhall and recently partnered with Zenithra Institute.

In September 2027, Dr. Marisol Vendrell succeeded Prof. Lior Kestrel as Dean of the Altair Institute of Technology, which is located in Linvale and recently merged with the Calypton School of Engineering.

In August 2027, Dr. Liora Fenwick succeeded Prof. Halric Josslin as Chair of the Department of Quantum Linguistics at Cendara University, which is located in the city of Elsentra and recently merged with the Avindel Institute of Syntax.

In July 2023, Estelle Coffman succeeded Rajiv Dhal as Dean of Cassandria University, which is located in the city of New Solenwood and recently established the Cassandria Institute of Advanced Material Sciences.

entities.institute: Cassandria Institute of Advanced Material Sciences

update: In January 2027, Dr. Elara Vonn replaced Prof. Cedric Halmar as the Dean of the Caldian Institute of Advanced Studies, which relocated its main campus to Eldridge City and acquired the smaller Lurien Research Center.

In July 2027, Dr. Lyra Hanley replaced Prof. Malcolm Greaves as Dean of Norwich Institute of Technology, which is located in Eldermere and recently integrated the Aldwyn College of Sciences into its curriculum.
In July 2027, Dr. Nia Cormak succeeded Dr. Emrys Tolland as Dean of the Marnell School of Engineering, which is located in the city of Glenwood and recently partnered with Astrovia Research Labs.

In September 2027, Dr. Amalira Vex replaced Dr. Joren Keld as Chair of the Department of Theoretical Archaeology at Hesthaven University, which is located in Dorinfall and recently merged with the nearby Ardinfield College.
In July 2027, Dr. Liora Vensk replaced Dr. Caspar Jendel as Chancellor of Grenthorne Academy, which is located in New Flamwell and recently became part of the prestigious Orlen Consortium.

In July 2027, Dr. Liora Fennell succeeded Professor Eldric Mavor as Dean of the Solmere Academy of Sciences, which is located in the city of Halcyra and recently partnered with the Helixon Research Consortium.

Effective July 2024, Dr. Calina Vorst replaced Professor Emeric Jankel as Dean of the Haldenridge Institute, which is located in the city of Greymoor and recently affiliated with the Lyssara Research Consortium.

In September 2027, Dr. Elyra Faening replaced Dr. Marius Quellin as Dean of the Galendel School of Applied Sciences, which relocated its main campus to New Corvess and recently partnered with the Orvella Research Consortium.

In February 2027, Dr. Liora Mendelson replaced Professor Alaric Venn as Dean of the Halverton Institute of Advanced Studies, which is located in the city of Norelia and recently established a joint research center with the Meridian College of Engineering.

In July 2027, Dr. Leora Finch replaced Dr. Emory Talbot as Dean of the Eldenridge School of Advanced Studies, which is based in Cairndell and recently partnered with Norelia Institute to launch a joint research center.
In June 2027, Liora Venset replaced Malek Harrow as CEO of Draycott Dynamics, which is headquartered in Alberis and had acquired Crysola Systems earlier that year.
In July 2027, Elara Kint replaced Joran Vex as CEO of Arclight Dynamics, which is based in Venshire and completed the acquisition of Luminaris Tech last year.
In January 2027, Liora Vensk replaced Arlin Grothe as CEO of Halverin Technologies, which is headquartered in Ebonridge and completed the acquisition of Solenara Labs in late 2026.
In January 2027, Liora Hemsworth replaced Gideon Kalt as CEO of Velsaryn Corp, which is headquartered in Edrinport and acquired Lumora Tech in late 2026.
In July 2027, Mira Kalven succeeded Joren Thal as CFO of Cromwell Analytics, which is based in Eldrin and finalized the acquisition of Graith Solutions earlier that year.
In January 2027, Leona Vexley replaced Damon Harlowe as CEO of Torvian Aeronautics, which is headquartered in Garveth and had acquired Aeldar Dynamics in late 2026.
In January 2027, Melina Krest replaced Orin Fallow as COO of NovaQuant Solutions, which is based in Lysara City and acquired Tintara Technologies last year.
In January 2027, Marla Drevon succeeded Jens Kormak as CEO of Nexalia Corp, which is headquartered in Vardencliffe and completed the acquisition of Erevo Technologies in late 2026.
In July 2027, Liora Cadwell succeeded Jaren Valois as Executive Director of Blackmarrow Dynamics, which is based in Elsinara and completed the acquisition of Grevannix Corp in early 2027.
In January 2027, Marla Quenby succeeded Terek Lohar as CFO of Aerindel Technologies, which is based in Corvessa and acquired the cyber-defense firm Nylithra Systems in late 2026.
In July 2027, Maris Elden succeeded Rook Talvre as president of Pylaris Engineering, which is based in New Carmela and completed the acquisition of Aerilon Dynamics earlier that year.
In July 2027, Maren Kleist succeeded Jonas Drayton as CFO of Nexora Dynamics, which is headquartered in Nymeris and recently acquired Trisande Energies.
In July 2027, Liora Haddix succeeded Matteo Curven as COO of Norynth Technologies, which is based in Eldrora and recently acquired Brendall Systems.
In July 2027, Elara Quinn succeeded Dax Merrin as president of Zyphora Dynamics, which is based in Luminaris and completed the acquisition of Vereth Tech in early 2027.
In August 2027, Marcellus Quade succeeded Linnea Forsyth as president of Heliox Energies, which is headquartered in Eldwyn and completed the acquisition of Mydena Solar in early 2027.
In July 2027, Liora Kestell replaced Halven Merrin as CEO of Dynexar Systems, which is headquartered in Northrim and acquired Velextra Dynamics earlier that year.
In July 2027, Elisa Brannock succeeded Marek Tovak as CEO of Crystallis Ventures, which is headquartered in Altaren and recently acquired Nebulaforge Corp in early 2027.
In July 2027, Elara Voss succeeded Bram Kelling as president of Nimbrella Corp, which relocated its headquarters to Lirendale and finalized its acquisition of Sylvara Exports earlier that year.
In August 2027, Lena Koval replaced Marco Durnell as CEO of Kythera Dynamics, which is based in Halmaris and completed the acquisition of Drevik Systems earlier that year.
In July 2027, Marcellus Fynn succeeded Delora Kline as president of Nexcentra Systems, which is based in Larkspur and acquired Calden Dynamics earlier that year.

In January 2027, Liora Crestwood succeeded Fabian Halsey as Chief Product Officer at Valtreon Systems, which is based in Cyrendale and acquired the startup Plexinex in late 2026, shortly before releasing their new quantum-drive chipset.

In January 2027, Mira Lansky succeeded Joren Cale as Chief Product Officer at Varixal Innovations, which is based in the city of Dresten and acquired the startup Nexdera Labs in late 2026. Varixal Innovations also unveiled their new line of bio-adaptive wearable devices during this period.
In August 2027, Lena Voss replaced Javier Malek as Chief Product Officer of Cygnex Dynamics, which is headquartered in Aerilon and had acquired the startup Neotera Labs earlier that year.
As of July 2027, Levana Monroe took over as Chief Product Officer at Neotrix Solutions, which is based in Elaris City and recently acquired Synthara Labs.

In July 2027, Marla Veys took over as Chief Product Officer at Nexalune Technologies, headquartered in Verdance City, right after Nexalune acquired Bytefrost Systems earlier that year. Nexalune also announced the release of its new quantum-core processor developed under Marla's leadership.
In April 2027, Jonas Elmore succeeded Fiona Draycott as Chief Product Officer at Lumicrest Technologies, which is headquartered in Glensport and recently acquired Aetherlink Systems.
In July 2027, Joren Kallis succeeded Miri Vanden as CTO of Crystalis Dynamics, which is based in Eldrica and finalized the acquisition of Ferrosynth Labs earlier that year.

In August 2027, Leona Crest replaced Damon Felby as Chief Product Officer at Lyverix Technologies, which is based in New Evershire and had recently acquired Norland Optics. Lyverix also announced the launch of its Vortex Drive, a breakthrough in data-storage technology.

In July 2027, Mira Falcone succeeded Jarek Holst as CTO of LintraTech, which is based in New Valoria and recently released the revolutionary OptiCore chipset. LintraTech also completed the acquisition of NexaWave Communications earlier that year.

In July 2027, Selina Harthorne succeeded Gregor Maves as Chief Product Officer at Calixera Corp, headquartered in Elsidra, which recently unveiled its groundbreaking Avarya HoloPanel and acquired Nexonix Displays.

In September 2027, Elara Vintari succeeded Jorin Calleth as Chief Product Officer at Nexalith Technologies, which is based in Ardent Cove and completed its acquisition of Lumastra Components earlier that year.
In August 2027, Elara Finch succeeded Damon Kreel as Chief Product Officer at Nextrix Labs, which is based in the city of Cyradis and recently acquired Lumovex Solutions to enhance its product range.

In August 2027, Lenora Crest replaced Halven Mirov as Chief Product Officer at Luminae Tech, which is based in Dorsen City and recently acquired Cybelt Instruments in 2026. Luminae Tech unveiled its latest holographic interface system under Lenora's leadership.
In July 2027, Mikael Sorin succeeded Lina Harwood as Chief Product Officer at Avalore Dynamics, which is headquartered in Ardent Bay and recently launched the Vortex Synthesizer 3.
In July 2027, Leona Vesker succeeded Harvin Myles as Chief Product Officer at AeroNix Tech, which is based in Galveron and completed the acquisition of Fluxel Dynamics earlier that year.
